name: studiomeyer-crew-hooks
description: Auto-log session feedback when Claude Code stops. One mcp_tool hook for the StudioMeyer Crew MCP. The persona-activation hook is intentionally bash (cwd-detection) — see README. Requires Claude Code v2.1.118 or later.

compliance.gdpr: Crew tenant data is isolated per user. Persona definitions are public (free tier) or user-owned (Pro tier). Stop hook writes one feedback row per session.
compliance.notes: crew_feedback writes one row per call — NOT idempotent. If Stop fires twice (e.g. user resumes), you get two feedback rows with the same auto-stop-hook tag. Acceptable for analytics. The user can override the auto rating mid-session by calling crew_feedback explicitly with a different value.

SessionStart_persona_hint.reason: Persona-activation requires cwd → persona mapping (regex case-statement). mcp_tool cannot do that — needs bash. See https://studiomeyer.academy/recipes/16.4-geo-crew-hook-bundle for the bash variant.
